licenseGate: Names and final implementations remain blocked until Paizo licensed-material review is complete.
designRules: No SF1e numerical bonus is converted directly.
Each base ancestry receives at most one major feature plus ordinary senses and movement.
Features with encounter-changing action economy are placed in feats.
Cultural behavior is never treated as biological destiny.
Divine terminology is translated into belief, ritual, psionics, technology, or finite cosmic phenomena.

prototypes.baselineFeature: Living Machine: remains compatible with ordinary healing and repair; construct immunities require a dedicated rules audit.

heritageSeeds.name: Industrial Chassis
heritageSeeds.mechanic: trained Crafting and a noncombat integrated tool

heritageSeeds.name: Sealed Chassis
heritageSeeds.mechanic: environmental breathing protection; vacuum immunity requires balance review

openQuestions: Whether the construct trait itself grants excessive immunities
Whether darkvision should move to a heritage

prototypes.baselineFeature: Limited Telepathy: 30 feet, shared language, communication without thought reading.

heritageSeeds.name: Phase-Touched
heritageSeeds.mechanic: minor force or incorporeal resistance; full reaction deferred to a feat

heritageSeeds.name: Mnemonic
heritageSeeds.mechanic: trained Occultism and memory-focused skill benefit

openQuestions: Darkvision plus telepathy may require lowering another heritage benefit

prototypes.baselineFeature: Prepared Identity: Change Shape into one configured humanoid identity; changing the stored identity requires downtime.

heritageSeeds.name: Cold-Blooded
heritageSeeds.mechanic: bounded resistance to poison or mental effects, not both

openQuestions: Prepared Identity action wording must remain distinct from Astrazoan Change Shape

prototypes.baselineFeature: Chromatophore Control: a bounded circumstance bonus to Hide after remaining still and exposing sufficient skin.

heritageSeeds.name: Augmented
heritageSeeds.mechanic: augmentation support without granting a free item or unrestricted extra slot

heritageSeeds.name: Chromatic Communicator
heritageSeeds.mechanic: visual signaling and social skill support

heritageSeeds.name: Terminator-Warden
heritageSeeds.mechanic: environmental adaptation to heat, cold, or radiation

openQuestions: Exact augmentation interaction depends on final SF2e augmentation slot rules

prototypes.baselineFeature: Four-Armed: one active pair of hands, switched using the standard SF2e action.

heritageSeeds.name: Force-Resonant
heritageSeeds.mechanic: minor force resistance with absorption deferred to a feat

heritageSeeds.name: Far Trader
heritageSeeds.mechanic: trained Society or Diplomacy plus trade lore

openQuestions: Four arms and darkvision consume most of the base ancestry budget
An original public-facing name may be required

prototypes.baselineFeature: Horns: 1d6 piercing unarmed Strike with shove or another single maneuver trait after playtest.

heritageSeeds.name: Heavy-Horned
heritageSeeds.mechanic: alternative horn trait focused on charging

heritageSeeds.name: Void-Hardened
heritageSeeds.mechanic: environmental resistance without full vacuum immunity

openQuestions: A 30-foot speed may replace one heritage benefit after playtest
